name: Hunter Ryx
dialogue: Heh. Knew you'd make it this far.
Been hunting since we last met — deeper woods, harder grass. My pack's bigger now.
Dojo's right there. But I'm not letting you walk in until you beat me.
Show me you've earned the climb.
preBattleLine: Hunter Ryx readies his hunt party — sharper than before.
postDefeatDialogue: The Five Pillars are gonna chew us both up. I'll see you in there.
